varieties.name: Myristica insipida var. insipida (Queensland Nutmeg) 🌱
varieties.traits: Small rainforest tree 10-16m, dark brown bark, myristicaceous branching

varieties.name: IISR Viswashree (A9/4 Selection)
varieties.yield_notes: Average 1,000 fruits/tree at 8th year, 3,122 kg dry nut and 480 kg mace per hectare

varieties.name: IISR Keralashree 🧬
varieties.origin: Farmer participatory breeding, Burliar, Tamil Nadu
varieties.traits: Bold nuts, thick dark red mace, rich in sabinene & myrcene, LOW myristicin
varieties.yield_notes: Superior to Viswashree in all parameters

varieties.name: Kochukudy (Punnathanam Jathy) 🏆
varieties.origin: Farmer Varkey Thoman, Idukki, Kerala - 70+ years development
varieties.traits: EXTRA-LARGE variety, 50 nuts/kg vs 125 standard, compact form allows 20ft spacing
varieties.yield_notes: 3,000 fruits/tree annually, 20kg nutmeg + 4.5kg mace at maturity
